creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:

    www/rt38/files       patch-Makefile.in pkg-message.in

    for dependencies [1]

  - Update to 3.8.2 [2]
  - Add GraphViz OPTION (default on) [2]
